item.title: Illumination Strategies for Reliable Defect Detection in High-Speed Quality Inspection
item.description: Every second counts on high-speed conveyor lines.

item.title: Wagon Automotive Implements Inline Metrology Cell for Complex Chassis Components
item.description: Wagon Automotive’s production environment involves highly complex parts with varied geometries that must be inspected with tight tolerances.

item.title: High-Speed CMOS X-ray Detection for AI Chip Inspection Launched
item.description: Korean digital X-ray detector specialist Rayence has introduced its industrial high-speed CMOS X-ray detector platform, the Flash Series, designed specifically for semiconductor AXI and high-speed 3D X-ray CT inspection systems.

item.title: Major Aerospace Manufacturer Scales AI Inspection with KITOV.ai
item.description: KITOV.ai, a leading provider of AI-Powered Quality Discovery solutions, has announced a follow-on order for an additional visual inspection system from a major American aerospace and defense manufacturer.

item.title: Bridging Virtual and Real Manufacturing with Physical AI
item.description: ABB Robotics has announced it is integrating NVIDIA Omniverse libraries into ABB Robotics’ RobotStudio to help manufacturers deploy physical AI in real world robotics applications.

item.title: Weaving the Digital Thread – The Interoperability Standards Powering Smart Manufacturing
item.description: As manufacturing continues its shift toward digital transformation, the concept of the digital thread has become central to initiatives around smart manufacturing, Industry 4.0, and data-driven quality.

item.title: Robot Accuracy – The Missing Link in Smart Manufacturing
item.description: The Renishaw RCS portfolio includes portable toolkits and in-process probing solutions designed specifically for six-axis industrial robots, allowing manufacturers to validate robot performance, improve positional accuracy and reduce downtime.
